nasb.text: But seek first His kingdom and His righteousness, and all these things will be added to you.

esv.text: But seek first the kingdom of God and his righteousness, and all these things will be added to you.

cnv.text: 你們要先求他的國和他的義，這一切都必加給你們。

ccb.text: “你们要先寻求上帝的国和祂的义，这一切都会赐给你们。

csbs.text: 所以你们应当先寻求神的国和神的义，这一切都将加给你们了。
